title: Blumo
description: Visual identity, information architecture, wireframes, and low-code website design with brand guidelines for Blumo.

process.challenge: Blumo needed a strong visual identity and a website that clearly communicated its value proposition in an engaging way.
process.approach: I developed the information architecture, low and high-fidelity wireframes, and the visual design of the site on a low-code platform — all backed by a brand guidelines document.
process.results: Functional website with a cohesive visual identity and complete brand guidelines to ensure consistency across all communications.
